_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to configure, place, and maintain a distributed sensor grid.
reference_document_element_description: Provision, configure, and maintain the data platform infrastructure, including compute environments, storage systems, networking, and security controls.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-015 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-006 (DA, cosine: 0.458), DA-T-009 (DA, cosine: 0.400).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.4/10 (raw 0.338). Shared vocabulary: [configure, maintain]. DCWF-only terms [ability, distributed, grid, place, sensor] vs WIDAI-only terms [compute, controls, data, environments, infrastructure, networking] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.906 (P=0.926, R=0.887). P exceeds R by 0.039 — the DCWF element's 10 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.7%). "Ability to configure, place, and maintain a distributed sensor grid." and "Provision, configure, and maintain the data platform infrastructure, including c" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.495 > STS 0.338 (gap +0.157). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [configure, maintain] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.0%. Shared tokens: [configure, maintain]. DCWF-only: [ability, distributed, grid, place, sensor]. WIDAI-only: [compute, controls, data, environments, infrastructure, networking].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.157 with low STS 0.338. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
